narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Demand for AI-specific chips and related infrastructure continues to drive strong performance in semiconductor companies, with significant investments from hyperscalers and cloud providers.
watchFor: NVDA earnings miss or weak guidance
Hyperscaler capex cuts at next earnings
Significant slowdown in AI model training or deployment

narratives.name: Memory Supercycle
narratives.thesis: Strong demand for high-bandwidth memory (HBM) and other advanced memory solutions, driven by AI, is leading to a supercycle in the memory chip industry.
watchFor: Memory chip oversupply emerges unexpectedly
HBM pricing power erodes
Major AI players shift memory architecture away from HBM

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: The strong demand for GLP-1 obesity and diabetes drugs continues to drive significant growth for pharmaceutical companies in this space, with new market entrants expanding access.
watchFor: New, more effective obesity treatments emerge
Significant pricing pressure on GLP-1 drugs
Unexpected long-term side effects or safety concerns arise

narratives.name: Aerospace & Defense Spending
narratives.thesis: Increased global geopolitical tensions and robust government spending are driving strong demand and record backlogs for aerospace and defense contractors.
watchFor: Major peace agreements reduce geopolitical tensions
Defense budget cuts in key countries
Significant delays or cancellations in large defense contracts

narratives.name: Intel/AMD Competitive Pressure
narratives.thesis: Intel and AMD face intense competition, particularly from Nvidia, in the rapidly evolving AI chip market, leading to concerns about market share and profitability.
watchFor: Intel or AMD announce a breakthrough AI chip that rivals Nvidia's performance
Nvidia's market share in AI CPUs/GPUs plateaus or declines
Major hyperscalers diversify away from Nvidia's ecosystem

narratives.name: AI Networking Trade
narratives.thesis: The buildout of AI data centers is creating significant demand for high-speed networking equipment, benefiting companies specializing in this area.
watchFor: Hyperscalers insource networking hardware development
Pricing pressure intensifies in AI networking components
Cisco or Arista report weaker-than-expected AI segment growth

narratives.name: AI Software & Cloud Adoption
narratives.thesis: Enterprises are increasingly adopting AI-powered software and cloud solutions, driving growth for companies that provide these services.
watchFor: Enterprise IT spending slows significantly
AI software adoption rates disappoint
Increased competition from open-source AI models

narratives.name: Semiconductor Equipment & Materials Demand
narratives.thesis: The ongoing expansion of semiconductor manufacturing capacity, driven by AI and other advanced technologies, is boosting demand for semiconductor equipment and materials.
watchFor: Global chip manufacturing capacity expansion slows down
Geopolitical tensions disrupt supply chains for critical materials
Major chipmakers cut capital expenditure forecasts

narratives.name: Retail Operational Challenges
narratives.thesis: Traditional retailers like Walmart are facing operational challenges, including supply chain issues and cost pressures, leading to stock declines.
watchFor: Walmart or Target report strong earnings and improved margins
Significant easing of supply chain costs
Consumer spending shifts back to traditional retail

narratives.name: Entertainment Content Expansion
narratives.thesis: Entertainment companies are focused on expanding content libraries and monetizing streaming services, with some showing signs of a turnaround.
watchFor: Disney+ or Hulu subscriber growth disappoints
Netflix reports accelerating subscriber losses
Increased competition from new streaming entrants

narratives.name: Banks - Diversified Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Diversified banks are showing resilience with strong Q1 earnings and positive analyst sentiment, despite ongoing discussions about regulatory oversight.
watchFor: Unexpected economic downturn leading to increased loan losses
Significant changes in interest rate policy that compress net interest margins
New regulatory capital requirements that impact profitability

narratives.name: Cybersecurity AI Integration
narratives.thesis: The integration of AI into cybersecurity solutions is enhancing threat detection and response, driving demand for advanced security platforms.
watchFor: Major cybersecurity breaches expose AI solution weaknesses
Increased regulatory scrutiny on AI in security
Customer churn due to complexity or cost of AI-driven security

narratives.name: Internet Content & Information Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Companies in internet content and information are navigating the impact of AI integration and competitive pressures, leading to mixed sentiment.
watchFor: Google or Meta report significant slowdown in ad revenue growth
New regulatory actions target content platforms
AI integration fails to drive meaningful user engagement or monetization

narratives.name: Internet Retail Innovation
narratives.thesis: E-commerce platforms are navigating intense competition and evolving consumer preferences, with some players showing innovation while others face headwinds.
watchFor: Amazon reports accelerating e-commerce growth and profitability
New entrants significantly disrupt the e-commerce landscape
Regulatory actions target dominant internet retailers

narratives.name: Farm & Heavy Construction Machinery Divergence
narratives.thesis: The heavy machinery sector is showing mixed signals, with some companies like Caterpillar demonstrating strong performance while others face uncertainty.
watchFor: Global infrastructure spending slows down
Commodity prices decline significantly, impacting agricultural demand
Interest rate hikes negatively affect equipment financing

narratives.name: Credit Services Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Credit services companies are expanding rewards programs and exploring new technologies like AI, but some face valuation scrutiny and acquisition-related stock declines.
watchFor: Consumer credit quality deteriorates significantly
Increased regulatory pressure on interchange fees or lending practices
New payment technologies disrupt traditional credit card networks

narratives.name: Apparel Retail Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Lululemon is navigating a proxy battle with its founder, adding uncertainty to its corporate governance and strategic direction, while Nike faces broader headwinds.
watchFor: Lululemon successfully resolves its proxy battle with a clear path forward
Nike reports a significant turnaround in sales or market share
Consumer discretionary spending on apparel unexpectedly surges

narratives.name: Capital Markets Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Capital markets firms are navigating a complex environment of regulatory discussions and mixed analyst sentiment, with some facing challenges in crypto revenue.
watchFor: Significant market volatility impacting trading volumes
New regulations on investment banking or brokerage activities
Further collapse in crypto trading volumes

narratives.name: Auto Manufacturers Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Tesla's stock is influenced by speculative merger talks with SpaceX and ongoing developments in its autonomous driving ambitions, creating volatility.
watchFor: Elon Musk explicitly denies SpaceX-Tesla merger talks
Tesla Robotaxi launch faces significant delays or regulatory hurdles
New competition emerges in the EV or autonomous driving space

narratives.name: Household & Personal Products Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Estee Lauder is experiencing positive momentum following strategic decisions and technical breakouts, signaling renewed investor interest in the consumer health and beauty segment.
watchFor: Estee Lauder's next earnings report disappoints
Luxury consumer spending declines significantly
New competitive threats in prestige beauty market

narratives.name: Residential Construction Resilience
narratives.thesis: Despite higher interest rates, the residential construction sector shows resilience, driven by persistent housing demand and limited inventory.
watchFor: Mortgage rates spike above 7.5%
Significant decline in housing starts or building permits
Major homebuilder reports weak order growth

narratives.name: Healthcare Plans Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Healthcare plans are navigating a complex environment of rising premiums and enrollment shifts, leading to mixed sentiment among investors.
watchFor: Government policy changes significantly impact ACA subsidies or mandates
Unexpectedly high medical cost trends emerge
Major competitive shifts in the health insurance market

narratives.name: Medical Devices Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Medical device companies are making strategic investments and navigating competitive landscapes, with some facing price target cuts despite innovation.
watchFor: New regulatory hurdles for device approvals
Increased pricing pressure from healthcare providers
Technological breakthroughs from competitors

narratives.name: Asset Management Watchlist
narratives.thesis: Asset management firms are seeing mixed valuations and performance, with some facing share price weakness despite strong earnings.
watchFor: Significant outflows from alternative asset funds
Underperformance of key investment strategies
Increased regulatory scrutiny on private equity or hedge funds

narratives.name: Software Infrastructure Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Software Infrastructure on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Restaurants on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Electrical Equipment & Parts on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Banks - Diversified Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Banks - Diversified on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Utilities - Independent Power Producers Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Utilities - Independent Power Producers on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Utilities - Renewable Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Utilities - Renewable on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Other Industrial Metals & Mining Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Other Industrial Metals & Mining on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Gold Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Gold on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

narratives.name: Silver Watchlist
narratives.thesis: No single narrative is driving Silver on the current tape — these names are in scope and watched for a catalyst to break out.

Technology.thesis: The AI capex cycle continues to be the dominant driver for the technology sector, particularly in semiconductors and related infrastructure. Strong demand for AI hardware and cloud services is fueling growth, despite some concerns about valuation and competitive pressures in specific sub-industries.
watchFor: Mag 7 hyperscaler capex guide DOWN at next earnings — would crack the AI demand thesis
Hot core CPI print > 0.4% MoM — forces a hawkish Fed repricing, hurting growth multiples
China export controls expand to HBM or advanced packaging — significant supply chain disruption

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: The consumer cyclical sector is experiencing a mixed bag of narratives. While some areas like residential construction show resilience, traditional retail is facing headwinds from inflation and competitive pressures. Auto manufacturers are seeing some speculative interest but also regulatory scrutiny.
watchFor: Unexpectedly strong retail sales data (ex-auto) > 0.5% MoM — would signal consumer resilience
Further deterioration in consumer sentiment or discretionary spending data
Interest rate hikes resume — dampens housing and big-ticket purchases

Communication Services.thesis: The Communication Services sector is seeing divergent trends. Internet content and information companies are grappling with AI integration and regulatory pressures, while entertainment companies are focusing on content expansion and streaming monetization. Social media faces ongoing scrutiny.
watchFor: Major tech companies report significant deceleration in advertising revenue
New regulatory proposals targeting social media or content platforms
Unexpectedly strong subscriber growth from streaming services

Industrials.thesis: The Industrials sector is seeing strength in Aerospace & Defense due to robust backlogs and geopolitical drivers, while other sub-industries like Farm & Heavy Construction Machinery are showing mixed signals but with underlying resilience.
watchFor: Major defense spending cuts announced by governments
Significant slowdown in global industrial production
Escalation of trade wars impacting machinery exports

Healthcare.thesis: Healthcare is a mixed bag, with the GLP-1 obesity drug wave continuing to drive significant interest and growth for leaders, while other areas like healthcare plans face enrollment challenges and medical devices navigate strategic investments and competitive pressures.
watchFor: Unexpected safety concerns or regulatory setbacks for GLP-1 drugs
Significant decline in healthcare plan enrollments or reimbursement rates
New breakthroughs in obesity treatment that challenge GLP-1 dominance

Financials.thesis: The Financials sector presents a mixed picture. Banks are generally stable with some positive earnings, but capital markets and asset management firms are navigating a complex regulatory and economic environment. Credit services are expanding rewards but face valuation scrutiny.
watchFor: Unexpected interest rate cuts by the Fed — hurts NIM for banks
Significant increase in loan defaults or credit card delinquencies
New, stringent financial regulations introduced

Consumer Defensive.thesis: The Consumer Defensive sector, represented by Household & Personal Products, is showing positive momentum driven by strategic moves and technical breakouts, indicating resilience in a generally stable sector.
watchFor: Significant downturn in consumer confidence impacting essential goods spending
Unexpected inflation in raw materials for household products
New competitive threats from private label brands

Utilities.thesis: The Utilities sector is showing positive momentum, particularly in independent power producers, driven by strong analyst sentiment and strategic developments.
watchFor: Unexpected regulatory changes impacting power generation or distribution
Significant increase in fuel costs for power producers
Downturn in industrial power demand

Basic Materials.thesis: The Basic Materials sector, specifically Other Industrial Metals & Mining, is experiencing mixed signals due to geopolitical factors and new partnerships, creating uncertainty around valuations.
watchFor: Significant shift in global commodity prices
New trade tariffs or restrictions on rare earth elements
Major supply disruptions from key mining regions

Precious Metals.thesis: Precious metals are gaining traction as a safe-haven asset amidst geopolitical uncertainties and a climbing bullion price, with gold showing particular strength.
watchFor: Significant de-escalation of global geopolitical tensions
Stronger-than-expected economic data leading to risk-on sentiment
Sharp appreciation of the US Dollar
